name: testcert-page
description: Pikachu Public Test Root CA Portal - React + Ant Design + Vite

scripts.dev:cf: concurrently -k -n vite,worker -c cyan,magenta "cross-env VITE_WATCH=1 vite build --watch --mode development" "wait-on dist/index.html && npm --prefix worker run dev -c wrangler.encrypt.toml"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && gh-pages -d dist -b gh-pages
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && npm --prefix worker run deploy:encrypt
